name: brainer
description: Token/context-efficient skills for AI coding agents. 31 skills span verification, continuity, wiki trust, retrieval, output filtering, loop gates, evaluation, and explicit/manual process workflows. The default frontier prompt surface is intentionally small; historical per-skill savings and current limitations are documented in eval/FINDINGS.md.
author: Saar Shai

plugins.name: brainer
plugins.description: All 31 skills bundled. compliance-canary auto-wires its quiet frontier profile: silent pending-intent state plus compact compliance-aware verification. Legacy broad probes and periodic re-anchor are disabled by default. Experimental process bodies and Brainer-audit hooks remain opt-in; deterministic tools stay callable.

hooks.description: compliance-canary default-on drift watcher and requirements-ledger guard.
prompt-triage classifier; opt-in via plugin config.
